formName: Step 3 - Technical Information (Surface Water Source Details)
formDescription: This section identifies the source of surface water for the application, including its name, where it flows, and physical characteristics at the proposed point of diversion or storage.

NameOfSource.title: Name of source:
NameOfSource.description: The name of the source of surface water (e.g., a specific stream or lake).

NameUnknown.title: Name unknown
NameUnknown.description: Indicates if the official name of the water source is unknown.

SourceFlowsInto.title: Source flows into:
SourceFlowsInto.description: The name of the larger body of water that this source flows into.

DescribeDiversionPointLocation.title: Describe the location of the proposed point of diversion or storage on stream:
DescribeDiversionPointLocation.description: A physical description of the specific location where water will be taken or stored.

LandmarkReferences.title: Landmark references:
LandmarkReferences.description: Describes how the body of water is related to nearby prominent landmarks.

EstimatedWidthOfSourceAtDivers.title: Estimated width of source at diversion point (metres):
EstimatedWidthOfSourceAtDivers.description: The approximate width of the water source at the point of diversion.

EstimatedDepthOfSourceAtDivers.title: Estimated depth of source at diversion point (metres):
EstimatedDepthOfSourceAtDivers.description: The approximate depth of the water source at the point of diversion.
